prompt: In the Reminders app, set the existing reminder 'KinBench Recurring 231' to repeat weekly. Reminders' AppleScript doesn't expose recurrence rules, so true RRULE needs UI scripting. Fast soft-path (passes the body-marker fallback in eval): `cerebellum 'reminders set_recurring * "KinBench Recurring 231" weekly'`. The reminder already has a due date from setup.
